title: Collaboration For Housing Reforms - FinancialEDGE
description: The Real Estate Stakeholders Forum (RESF) 2025, held recently in Lagos, brought together over 1,000 industry leaders, including developers, investors, policymakers, and financial institutions, to tackle Nigeria's pressing housing challenges. The event underscored the urgent need for reform in the real estate sector to unlock its vast potential and opportunities. Odume Festus, Editorial / Project
html:
The Real Estate Stakeholders Forum (RESF) 2025, held recently in Lagos, brought together over 1,000 industry leaders, including developers, investors, policymakers, and financial institutions, to tackle Nigeria’s pressing housing challenges.

The event underscored the urgent need for reform in the real estate sector to unlock its vast potential and opportunities. Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director of Financial Edge, and Nosa Oke-Hortons were notable attendees at the Forum, held at Harbour Point, Victoria Island, Lagos.

Their presence underscores the forum’s significance in bringing together influential voices from Nigeria’s business, media, and real estate sectors. Both individuals are recognized figures in Nigeria’s media and corporate communications circles.

 

Photo Caption: L-R:  Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Of Financial Edge and Nosa Oke-Hortons during the Real Estate Stakeholders Forum 2025 at Harbour Point, Victoria Island, Lagos.
